## Checklist

- [ ] Tested locally with `pnpm build && pnpm preview` (not just `pnpm dev`)
- [ ] All internal links use `${import.meta.env.BASE_URL}` (no bare `/` paths)
- [ ] No new TypeScript or build errors (`pnpm build` exits cleanly)
- [ ] Screenshots / recording attached if visual output changed
